title: Add Windows Smoke Testing
body:
Add initial podman machine verification testing on Windows. 

A future PR will port the full linux machine testsuite. 

This PR should not be merged until https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/228 merges.

```release-note
NONE
```
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: PTAL @edsantiago @cevich , when you get a chance thanks!
@n1hility sorry for late response. I've tried looking at this but there's no way I can review it: I have no knowledge of Windows and no way to even test it.

> I have no knowledge of Windows and no way to even test it.

Ed, if you take off your glasses, stand on the other side of the room, and squint your eyes real good, it looks ***JUST*** like bash :rofl:

> > I have no knowledge of Windows and no way to even test it.
> 
> Ed, if you take off your glasses, stand on the other side of the room, and squint your eyes real good, it looks _**JUST**_ like bash 🤣

ROFL
rebased against latest main hoping that resolves the unrelated failures
Filed #16383 for the (almost certainly a) flake, and restarted test.

LGTM and CI is finally green, but I'll defer to @cevich for final merge if all his concerns are addressed. Task map is now: 
![cirrus-map-pr16257](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/265639/199504193-fcb923b1-bec6-410e-9362-7ee292f04f10.png)
New task is lavender near lower right.
Thanks @n1hility for all your work on this.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *n1hility*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
